ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot urgently signaling for help, reflecting the distress inherent in the SOS emoji.  The robot will use both arms in a dynamic, attention-grabbing motion. Frame 1 establishes a base pose. Frame 2 initiates the outward reach and upward movement of both arms. Frame 3 shows the arms reaching their peak, signaling distress.  Frame 4 begins the return to a more neutral position. Frame 5 shows the arms returning to a resting position, completing the cycle. The sequence uses both joint1 and joint2 to create a natural, expressive motion.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready to signal
both arms sweep up and out, a desperate plea
arms reach high, a frantic cry for help
arms begin to lower, the signal fades
arms return to a resting, defeated state
